== Notes for [[Item:Q101909|Q101909]] ==

His father, as calculated here, buried in Jewish cemetery, 1535--Findagrave But born in 1575 (so son's dates are probably too close)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9FA7D01EFBBFA9822EF79916C9A51
geni:6000000000742332169

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
